info.address2: Weng’ao Industrial Zone Chunhu Subdistrict Fenghua District
info.longBusinessSummary: Rubber Leaf Inc., through its subsidiary, Rubber Leaf Sealing Products (Zhejiang) Co., Ltd., engages in the research and development, design, production, and sale of automotive rubber and plastic sealing strips in China. It operates through two segments: Direct Supply and Indirect Supply. The company offers synthetic rubber, rubber compound, car window seals, auto parts, etc. It also exports its products. Rubber Leaf Inc. was founded in 2019 and is based in Ningbo, China.

companyOfficers.name: Ms. Xingxiu  Hua
companyOfficers.title: President, CEO & Chairperson of the Board

companyOfficers.name: Mr. Jun  Tong
companyOfficers.title: Chief Marketing Officer, Chief Technical Officer & Director
